top3.sql:
SELECT 
    p_channel_dmail,
    p_channel_email,
    p_channel_catalog,
    p_channel_tv,
    p_channel_radio,
    p_channel_press,
    p_channel_event,
    p_channel_demo,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM catalog_sales
JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN promotion ON cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk
WHERE d_year = 1999
GROUP BY 
    p_channel_dmail,
    p_channel_email,
    p_channel_catalog,
    p_channel_tv,
    p_channel_radio,
    p_channel_press,
    p_channel_event,
...

SELECT 
    p_channel_catalog AS channel,
    p_promo_name AS promotion,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales cs
    JOIN promotion p ON cs.cs_promo_sk = p.p_promo_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_year = 1999
GROUP BY 
    p_channel_catalog,
    p_promo_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    p_channel_dmail,
    p_channel_email,
    p_channel_catalog,
    p_channel_tv,
    p_channel_radio,
    p_channel_press,
    p_channel_event,
    p_channel_demo,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM catalog_sales
JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN promotion ON cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk
WHERE d_year = 1999
GROUP BY 
    p_channel_dmail,
    p_channel_email,
    p_channel_catalog,
    p_channel_tv,
    p_channel_radio,
    p_channel_press,
    p_channel_event,
...
